query:
SELECT id, title, status, completedScenes, totalScenes, errorMessage FROM musicVideoJobs WHERE id = 510025;
SELECT COUNT(*) as sceneCount, mvSceneStatus FROM musicVideoScenes WHERE jobId = 510025 GROUP BY mvSceneStatus;
